expo.name: SkillBridge
expo.description: Peer-to-peer student skill-sharing platform connecting university students to teach and learn from each other

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SkillBridge needs access to your camera to take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SkillBridge needs access to your photo library to select profile photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SkillBridge needs access to your microphone for voice messages.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SkillBridge to access your photos to upload a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SkillBridge to access your camera.
